code: export const fileToBase64=file=>new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{if(!file){resolve('');return;}const reader=new FileReader();reader.onload=()=>{const result=String(reader.result||'');resolve(result.includes(',')?result.split(',')[1]:result);};reader.onerror=()=>reject(new Error('No se pudo procesar la imagen.'));reader.readAsDataURL(file);});
